valid.name: no-pk-update

invalid.name: custom-pk-name
invalid.code: UPDATE users SET uuid = '...' WHERE name = 'a';

errors.message: Avoid `UPDATE` on the primary-key column `uuid`. Primary keys are intended to be immutable; FK references and external systems can hold the old value.

invalid.name: update-id
invalid.code:
UPDATE users SET id = 99 WHERE id = 1;
UPDATE orders SET orders_id = 99 WHERE orders_id = 1;

errors.message: Avoid `UPDATE` on the primary-key column `id`. Primary keys are intended to be immutable; FK references and external systems can hold the old value.
Avoid `UPDATE` on the primary-key column `orders_id`. Primary keys are intended to be immutable; FK references and external systems can hold the old value.
